queries.name: pagerank_yields_rows
queries.cypher: CALL pagerank() YIELD node, rank RETURN COUNT(*) AS row_count

queries.name: pagerank_all_positive
queries.cypher: CALL pagerank() YIELD node, rank RETURN MIN(rank) > 0 AS all_positive

queries.name: pagerank_sums_approx_one
queries.cypher: CALL pagerank() YIELD node, rank RETURN ROUND(SUM(rank) * 10) / 10 AS approx_sum

queries.name: pagerank_alias
queries.cypher: CALL pagerank() YIELD node RETURN COUNT(*) AS cnt

queries.name: pagerank_scalar_after_call
queries.cypher: CALL pagerank() YIELD * RETURN COUNT(*) AS primed
queries.errorMessage: Syntax error at line 1, column 22: no viable alternative at input 'CALL pagerank() YIELD *'

queries.name: pagerank_score_non_negative
queries.cypher: CALL pagerank() YIELD node, rank RETURN MIN(rank) >= 0 AS ok

queries.name: pagerank_distinct_nodes
queries.cypher: CALL pagerank() YIELD node RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT node) AS uniq_nodes

queries.name: wcc_yields_rows
queries.cypher: CALL wcc() YIELD node, component_id RETURN COUNT(*) AS row_count

queries.name: wcc_component_ids_non_negative
queries.cypher: CALL wcc() YIELD node, component_id RETURN MIN(component_id) >= 0 AS ok

queries.name: wcc_alias_weakly_connected
queries.cypher: CALL weakly_connected_components() YIELD node, component_id RETURN COUNT(*) AS cnt

queries.name: wcc_at_least_two_components
queries.cypher: CALL wcc() YIELD node, component_id RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT component_id) >= 2 AS multi_component

queries.name: wcc_scalar_after_call
queries.cypher: CALL wcc() YIELD * RETURN COUNT(*) AS primed
queries.errorMessage: Syntax error at line 1, column 17: no viable alternative at input 'CALL wcc() YIELD *'

queries.name: wcc_distinct_nodes
queries.cypher: CALL wcc() YIELD node RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT node) AS uniq_nodes
